commit.message:
8377938: remove regtesthelpers & PassFailJFrame

This is in response to:
https://github.com/openjdk/jdk/pull/30401#discussion_r2997114800

8380790: remove "/manual" from run tag

This is in response to:
https://github.com/openjdk/jdk/pull/30401#discussion_r2990839770

8380790: reuse JEditorPaneAccessibleHypertextSupport

getAccessibleText() is the only place JEditorPaneAccessibleHypertextSupport is constructed.

(I don't see why JEditorPaneAccessibleHypertextSupport was written as a separate class. Ideally I'd consider flattening it into AccessibleJEditorPaneHTML. But since it's already released as a protected class: I don't want to risk refactoring it away in case some developers have dependencies around it.)
